app.name: Morphy
app.tagline: Adaptive analytics for heterogeneous data domains

risk-scoreboard.title: Risk Scoreboard
risk-scoreboard.description: Ranked operational risk layout emphasizing outliers, scores, and triage order.

pressure-board.title: Pressure Board
pressure-board.description: Queue and saturation board for capacity pressure and bottleneck comparison.

timeline-analysis.title: Timeline Analysis
timeline-analysis.description: Trend-oriented layout for time-varying signals, slopes, and temporal comparisons.

correlation-inspector.title: Correlation Inspector
correlation-inspector.description: Cross-linked layout for associating hosts, users, jobs, partitions, and other entities.

incident-summary.title: Incident Summary
incident-summary.description: Narrative-first operational briefing layout with actions, caveats, and confidence.

job-detail-sheet.title: Job Detail Sheet
job-detail-sheet.description: Job-centric layout with workload attribution and resource behavior.
